case_title: SIGNET BANK/VIRGNIA vs. CRUMP, WILLIS W

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SIGNET BANK/VIRGNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGNET BANK/VIRGNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUMP, WILLIS W $6,765.88 PRINCIPAL, $2,341.92 INTEREST, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,181.80, ALL FURTHER PROCESS TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF PLTF'S LAW FIRM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMT AND PERSONALLY SERVED ON 7/28/92 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
